results.title: One Dollar Resume Review: Professional resume review for just $1 | Product Hunt
results.content:
Viktor.com

Viktor.comAn AI coworker that actually does the work

Promoted

Harsh Agrawal

One Dollar Resume Review

One Dollar Resume Review

Maker

📌

Contrary to popular belief, Resumes are still a very important part of the job hunt. If you can't impress someone in one page then it's very unlikely that they will spend time interviewing you. After going through 1000s of resumes and helping 20+ companies build their teams, we have created this AI-powered Resume Review tool that will help you to identify and resolve the most common issues.
